insight: CraftEngine re-processes chat packets after ChatControl builds the component, which can drop MiniMessage tag rendering details (e.g. the second skin/overlay layer of Paper 1.21.9+ native `<head:name>` tag). When users report chat tags rendering partially or differently only with ChatControl active, ask if CraftEngine is installed and have them disable it to confirm; the fix belongs on CraftEngine's side, not ChatControl.
